title: YOUTH SERVICES - 211info
text: SELF ENHANCEMENT INC YOUTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers in-school case management and support as well as after-school enrochment programs. Services include mentoring, case management, parenting classes, and referrals to outside resources. Parent coordinators work with family service staff to help parents find housing, employment, and counseling in order to provide a safe environment for their children. 3920 N Kerby Avenue Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Grades 2nd-12th and attendence at partnering school. Check website for list of partnering schools. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-7pm, Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 249-1721 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 249-1721 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Contact school for enrollment information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Portland (North/Northeast Portland and East Portland) Services: Case/Care Management * At Risk Families Family Counseling Mentoring Programs Parenting Skills Classes School Based Integrated Services Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUN COMMUNITY SCHOOLS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SELF ENHANCEMENT INC
